summary: Superb soundboard composite mix with a top‑notch upgrade, though the performance details are not discussed.
review: The reviewers give this recording five stars, lauding Tim Dalton, Scott Clugston and Charlie Miller for delivering an excellent upgraded mix of the existing sources. No specific comments on the musical performance or setlist were provided, so the assessment focuses on the high‑quality soundboard composite audio.

ai_rating.rationale: A single glowing five‑star review emphasizes an outstanding recording mix; with no performance feedback, rating leans on the excellent technical quality while acknowledging limited data.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Superb upgrade of extant sources; crisp, well‑balanced mix praised by reviewer.
